description: Double-close risk in try-catch: fd closed in try block, then closed again in catch block. Safe version uses a flag to prevent double-close.

expected.notes: fd closed at line 8 in try block, then again at line 10 in catch block if readSync throws after partial execution
noise: state-double-close — flag-guarded pattern prevents actual double close
noise: fd is closed in both try and catch paths — not a real leak
noise: safeClosePattern properly manages fd with closed flag guard
